intents.answer: Mahnoor Sarfraz is a dedicated Full-Stack Developer specializing in the MERN stack, Next.js, and React Native. She has over a year of experience building production-level applications and is currently working at TechsArk. She's also an AI enthusiast who loves integrating LLMs into web applications.

phrases: What frameworks have you worked with?
Tell me about your technical skills
intents.answer: Her technical stack includes React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS on the frontend. For backend, she uses Node.js, Express, and MongoDB. She's also proficient in React Native for mobile and has experience with AI tools like LangChain, OpenAI, and Google Gemini API.

Mahnoor is currently a Junior React & React Native Developer at TechsArk, where she works on a B2B platform called Qafalah. Previously, she completed a 6-month frontend internship at Tech Fighters. She has experience in both web and mobile development within professional team environments.

Mahnoor has built several impressive projects, including an Autonomous Research Agent using LangGraph, an AI-Powered Code Reviewer, and a MERN stack real estate platform. You can find more details in the Projects section of this website!

phrases: Tell me about your AI experience
Do you know how to build AI agents?
What is your experience with Google Gemini?
intents.answer: She is deeply involved in the AI space. She has built autonomous agents using LangGraph and Groq, integrated multimodal pipelines with Gemini API for damage claim verification, and developed AI code reviewers using OpenAI. She's passionate about how AI can improve real-world products.
You can reach Mahnoor via email at mahnoorsarfraz23@gmail.com or by using the contact form at the bottom of this page. She's also active on LinkedIn!
You can download her resume by clicking the 'Download Resume' button in the Hero section or the header. It contains a detailed overview of her education, skills, and experience.

fallback: I'm designed to answer questions about Mahnoor, her projects, skills, experience, and services. Could you please rephrase your question or ask something specific about her work?

greetings.answer: Hi! I'm Mahnoor's AI assistant. How can I help you today? You can ask about her projects, skills, or experience.
